title: PushSubscriptionCreateInput does not derive Default — correct
description: PushSubscriptionCreateInput explicitly does not derive Default, and the doc comment calls this out. client_id, device_client_id, and url have no safe defaults — a zeroed-out struct would produce a nonsense request. The comment prevents a future contributor from adding #[derive(Default)] 'for convenience'. This is exactly the right pattern for input types with required fields.
